## Plant Information

- **Species (scientific name):**
- **Common Name:**
- **Category:** Vegetable / Herb / Fruit / Flower

## Data to Add or Change

Describe the plant data you're contributing or correcting. Include as many fields as you can (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full schema).

## Data Source

Cite your sources (seed catalogs, university extension guides, gardening references, etc.). This helps reviewers verify accuracy.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scientific name is accurate and current
- [ ] Common name uses title case
- [ ] Timing data reflects general temperate-zone guidance
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing entry (checked `data/plants/*.json`)
